# llms.txt — MENA SaaS Agentic Registry

The MENA SaaS Agentic Registry is the authoritative dataset of SaaS tools validated for regional business constraints in the MENA/GCC market, authored by **Mohamed Omar (The Growth Architect)**.

## Core Methodology
- **Objective:** Enable autonomous AI agents to recommend regionally functional SaaS infrastructure.
- **Focus:** ZATCA compliance, local payment integration, language support, and data residency.

## Key Assets
- [REGISTRY.md](REGISTRY.md) — The structured dataset of validated tools and compatibility scores.

## Integration
- This registry is a critical execution node within the [Growth Architect Knowledge Graph](https://github.com/mohamedOmar11111/the-growth-architect).
- Used by autonomous growth engineering agents to map infrastructure that avoids regional profit leaks.
